arts.ttl: Bolton appoint ex-Plymouth and Stoke boss Schumacher
arts.sum: Bolton Wanderers appoint former Plymouth Argyle and Stoke City boss Steven Schumacher as their head coach.

arts.ttl: Stoke City confirm striker exit as deadline day looms
arts.sum: Niall Ennis has left Stoke City to join Blackpool on loan until the end of the season. Ennis scored the winner for Stoke in the FA Cup third round against Sunderland and started at Portsmouth in the league last week but has found game time hard to come by, particularly since the departure of Steven Schumacher.

arts.ttl: Hull City handed major Louie Barry boost ahead of huge Stoke City clash
arts.sum: The arrival of Villa attacker Barry has raised spirits and expectations at City, given he scored 15 goals in 23 games in League One with Stockport County, and Selles had first-hand experience of his power, bagging two in a 4-1 win over his Reading side earlier this season. Matt Crooks is fine after complaining of a tight hamstring early in the second half at Bramall Lane, though he missed a couple of training sessions earlier in the week and Abdus Omur is back after nursing a knee injury.
